title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Xpressbees - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Xpressbees - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Xpressbees invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Agra location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Xpressbees:
Xpressbees is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Xpressbees!
